interpretation: 地缘/宏观是当前市场主线，关注美伊谈判进展和油价走势 | 能源/黄金等大宗商品受到关注，通胀预期可能升温 | 美股市场情绪偏强，关注持续性 | （来源：X/Twitter，12 条高信号）

noteworthy.title: BREAKING: Second F-15E crew member rescued after heavy firefight - must still exfiltrate from Iran
noteworthy.snippet: The second crew member from the downed F-15E has been rescued after a heavy firefight. Missing crew member confirmed rescued but not safe yet as they must still exfiltrate from Iran.

noteworthy.title: BREAKING: Trump announces second F-15E pilot shot down on Friday has been rescued from Iran
noteworthy.snippet: President Trump announces that the second F-15E pilot who was shot down on Friday has been rescued from Iran.

noteworthy.title: US begging Iran for 48hr ceasefire - Pete Hegseth accused
noteworthy.snippet: You are currently begging Iran for a 48hr ceasefire - mockery of Pete Hegseth and US posture.

noteworthy.title: Iran gives Trump excuse to massively escalate - deadline for deal in first hour after futures open tomorrow
noteworthy.snippet: Iran targeted neighbour states' civilian infrastructure. Gives Trump an excuse to massively escalate tomorrow in the timeframe he gave them to make a deal (first hour after futures open tomorrow).

noteworthy.title: JCPOA history: Trump tore up Iran nuclear deal in previous term - Iran still complied with IAEA rules
noteworthy.snippet: Iran and US already had nuclear deal that was torn up by Trump in his last time in white house and it had verification methods built in. They got screwed once already when they were holding their end,

noteworthy.title: Oman and Iran meet to discuss Strait of Hormuz transit - Ceasefire odds drop to 1%
noteworthy.snippet: Oman and Iran meet to discuss transit through Strait of Hormuz amid ceasefire doubts. Ceasefire odds drop to 1%.

noteworthy.title: Iran FM tells Pakistan: Tehran determined to defend itself using all capabilities - Gulf conflict enters sixth week
noteworthy.snippet: Iran FM tells Pakistan that Tehran is determined to defend itself using all capabilities, as the Gulf conflict enters its sixth week with no ceasefire in sight.

noteworthy.title: Prediction markets: US x Iran ceasefire by April 30 = 18 cents, by May 31 = 34 cents - Jet fuel costs skyrocket
noteworthy.snippet: Prediction markets are moving: US x Iran ceasefire by April 30? 18¢. US x Iran ceasefire by May 31? 34¢. Jet fuel costs skyrocket amid Iran war.
